---
title: "Ven Seyhah – Research Profile"
format: pptx
---

## Slide 1: Ven Seyhah – Research Profile

- - Former Research Fellow, Cambodia Development Resource Institute (CDRI)
- - Master's & PhD in International Development Studies, Graduate School of International Development (GSID), Nagoya University, Japan
- - Current research fellow, Centre for Development Economics and Trade, CDRI
- - Email: seyhah@cdri.org.kh
- - Photo available on CDRI staff page

## Research Interests & Expertise

- - Labour Economics
- - Trade and Industry
- - Impact Evaluation (Causal Inference)
- - Data Science in R
- - Skills for Industry, Economic Integration, and Industrial Transformation
- - Quantitative analysis using R, STATA, and GAMS

## References

- References
- [1] CDRI Staff Profile. https://cdri.org.kh/staff/ven-seyhah
- [2] Five Priorities for a Green and Inclusive Economic Transformation in Cambodia. 2024. https://cdri.org.kh/publication/five-priorities-for-a-green-and-inclusive-economic-transformation-in-cambodia
- [3] Demand for and Supply of Digital Skills in Cambodia. 2023. https://cdri.org.kh/publication/demand-for-and-supply-of-digital-skills-in-cambodia
- [4] Exploring Insights into Vocational Skills Development and Industrial Transformation in Cambodia. 2020. https://cdri.org.kh/publication/exploring-insights-into-vocational-skills-development-and-industrial-transformation-in-cambodia
- [5] The Contribution of Vocational Skills Development to Cambodia’s Economy. 2019. https://cdri.org.kh/publication/the-contribution-of-vocational-skills-development-to-cambodia-s-economy
- [6] Skills and Transformation in Cambodia’s Industry. 2021. https://cdri.org.kh/publication/skills-and-transformation-in-cambodia-s-industry-1
